name: obsidian-crypto-pro
description: Plugin avanzado de cifrado AES-GCM para Obsidian

scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json')); m.version=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json')).version; fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(m, null, '	'));"

author: marcosgus
